chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-339 of 2023 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 10.10.2025 Mr. Irfan Ali Soomro, Advocate for petitioners Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General along with Darya Khan Chandioi, Assistant Commissioner Kotdiji ************** In compliance with the directions, the Assistant Commissioner Kotdiji appeared and has filed a statement along with certain documents, same is taken on record. From the perusal of the said statement, it appears that the process for acquiring the land has been initiated. For one scheme, a notification under Section 6 has already been issued, and for the remaining schemes, the notification will be issued within 15 days. In view of this statement, learned counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the instant Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the petition is disposed of with directions to the Assistant Commissioner Kotdiji/Land Acquisition Officer to complete the entire process and pass the award within 30 days. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
